title: alsine arctica var. scapigera
intro: Alsine arctica var. scapigera, also known as the Arctic Alsine or Alpine Crowberry, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Saxifragaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Alsine arctica var. scapigera include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its antimicrobial properties which can help to fight off infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas or infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
